Source   Edit  

Construction System

Ship and building construction per economy.md

Construction mechanics:

  • Projects have total cost and progress
  • Production applied each maintenance phase
  • Projects complete when cost paid >= cost total

REFACTORED (Phase 9): Data-Oriented Design

  • Eliminated 120+ lines of case duplication
  • All config lookups moved to config_accessors.nim (macro-generated)
  • Reduced from 320 lines → 200 lines (37% reduction)
Ship Construction Times (reference.md:9.1 and 9.1.1) (Cost and base time accessors provided by config_accessors.nim)Building Construction (provided by config_accessors.nim)
  • getBuildingCost, getBuildingTime, requiresSpaceport now in config_accessors
Industrial Unit Investment (economy.md:3.4)Construction ManagementConstruction Queue Helpers

Imports

types, ../../common/types/units, ../config/construction_config, ../config/facilities_config, ../config/ships_config, ../gamestate, config_accessors

Procs

proc advanceConstruction(colony: var Colony): Option[CompletedProject] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Advance construction by one turn (upfront payment model) Returns completed project if finished Per economy.md:5.0 - full cost paid upfront, construction tracks turns Source   Edit   
proc cancelConstruction(colony: var Colony): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Cancel construction and return refund (50% of total cost) Returns refunded PP amount Per economy.md:5.0 - 50% refund on cancellation Source   Edit   
proc createBuildingProject(buildingType: string): ConstructionProject {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create building construction project with upfront payment Per economy.md:5.0 - full cost must be paid upfront Source   Edit   
proc createIndustrialProject(colony: Colony; units: int): ConstructionProject {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create IU investment project with upfront payment Per economy.md:5.0 - full cost must be paid upfront Source   Edit   
proc createShipProject(shipClass: ShipClass; cstLevel: int = 1): ConstructionProject {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create ship construction project with upfront payment model Requires CST level to calculate actual build time Per economy.md:5.0 - full cost must be paid upfront Source   Edit   
proc getIndustrialUnitCost(colony: Colony): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Calculate cost for next IU investment Cost scales based on IU percentage relative to PU

Per economy.md:3.4:

  • Up to 50% PU: 1.0x (30 PP)
  • 51-75%: 1.2x (36 PP)
  • 76-100%: 1.5x (45 PP)
  • 101-150%: 2.0x (60 PP)
  • 151%+: 2.5x (75 PP)
Source   Edit   
proc getShipBuildTime(shipClass: ShipClass; cstLevel: int): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

Get actual construction time in turns with CST modifier Per reference.md:9.1.1

Formula: ceiling(base_time × (1.0 - (CST_level - 1) × 0.10)) Minimum: 1 turn

Source   Edit   
proc startConstruction(colony: var Colony; project: ConstructionProject): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Start new construction project at colony Returns true if started successfully

NOTE: This function is DEPRECATED for build queue system. The economy resolution code directly manages constructionQueue now. We keep this for backwards compatibility but it no longer blocks on underConstruction.

The build queue system allows multiple simultaneous projects up to dock capacity. Construction validation happens in economy_resolution.nim via canAcceptMoreProjects().

Source   Edit  

Exports

ConstructionProject, CompletedProject, ConstructionType, getShipConstructionCost, getShipBaseBuildTime, getBuildingCost, getBuildingTime, requiresSpaceport
